assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-21 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' followed by the separator row '|---|---|---|---|' and no data rows.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 23-26 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-35 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 11 states '**Result: No Serena MCP tools discovered.**' after examining available MCP tools for Serena instances.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 29 states '**Result: No Atlassian MCP tools discovered.** No tools matching the `mcp__atlassian__` prefix were found among the available MCP tools.' Lines 33-34 state the user chose '**manual entry** (option 2: skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually)' and lines 37-43 show the manually provided fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 17-21 document the prompt: '> "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence, or set up Serena first?"' followed by 'The user chose to **continue without code intelligence**.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 37-41 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three required fields are present with the expected values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 94-98 document the opt-in prompt: '> "Would you like to enable security triage for this project?"' and record '**The user declined.** Security Configuration was not created.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after the Bug Configuration section at line 42.
